description_long: This is a stylish open-toe sandal featuring a thick, textured blue sole and a black front strap that covers the toes. The upper part of the sandal is constructed from a blue material, with a prominent gold buckle on the side for adjustable fastening. The sandal has a wedge heel, providing both height and stability, and the sole appears to have a grippy tread for traction. The back of the sandal is closed with a blue strap that wraps around the heel, ensuring a secure fit. The interior is lined with a soft, flesh-toned material for comfort. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for urban walking and casual outings.
description: A modern open-toe sandal with a blue wedge sole, black front strap, and gold buckle, designed for comfort and urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue wedge sole, black front strap, and gold buckle on the blue upper strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design and the black strap covering the toes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous blue upper and wedge heel, with no buckle visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed blue heel strap and the wedge heel's thickness.
